mapper.sql: select maker_bm, maker_short_name, maker_mat_no, maker_back_no, maker_mat_name, maker_mat_name_en, maker_color_code, maker_color, maker_snp, maker_cal_unit, maker_buy_unit, maker_spec_model, maker_mat_catg, maker_left_right_flag, maker_imp_protect_flag, maker_car_model, maker_car_per_qty, maker_place_pos, maker_post_proc, maker_pack_bm, maker_pack_rate, maker_pack_group, maker_tray_std_box_qty, maker_init_stock_type, maker_label_color, maker_label_tmpl, maker_mat_label_tmpl, maker_mod_tmpl, maker_use_flag, maker_line, maker_backup1, maker_backup2, maker_backup3, stock_down, stock_up, hold_time_min, hold_time_max, cust_bm, cust_short_name, cust_mat_no, cust_back_no, cust_mat_name, cust_mat_name_en, cust_color_code, cust_color, cust_snp, cust_cal_unit, cust_buy_unit, cust_spec_model, cust_mat_catg, cust_left_right_flag, cust_imp_protect_flag, cust_car_model, cust_car_per_qty, cust_place_pos, cust_post_proc, cust_pack_bm, cust_pack_rate, cust_pack_group, cust_label_color, cust_label_tmpl, cust_mat_label_tmpl, cust_mod_tmpl, cust_use_flag, cust_backup1, cust_backup2, cust_backup3, prepare_lead_time, send_lead_time, maker_cal, maker_line_bm, mat_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mo_material
mapper.select: select a.*, b.maker_mat_no as maker_mat_no1, b.cust_mat_no as cust_mat_no1, b.cust_color_code as cust_color_code1, b.order_no as order_no1, b.part_name, b.back_no as back_no1 from mo_material a left join mo_material_bom b on a.maker_mat_no=b.maker_mat_no and a.cust_mat_no=b.cust_mat_no and a.cust_color_code=b.cust_color_code where a.maker_mat_no = #{makerMatNo} and a.cust_mat_no = #{custMatNo} and a.cust_color_code = #{custColorCode}
mapper.insert: insert into mo_material(maker_bm, maker_short_name, maker_mat_no, maker_back_no, maker_mat_name, maker_mat_name_en, maker_color_code, maker_color, maker_snp, maker_cal_unit, maker_buy_unit, maker_spec_model, maker_mat_catg, maker_left_right_flag, maker_imp_protect_flag, maker_car_model, maker_car_per_qty, maker_place_pos, maker_post_proc, maker_pack_bm, maker_pack_rate, maker_pack_group, maker_tray_std_box_qty, maker_init_stock_type, maker_label_color, maker_label_tmpl, maker_mat_label_tmpl, maker_mod_tmpl, maker_use_flag, maker_line, maker_backup1, maker_backup2, maker_backup3, stock_down, stock_up, hold_time_min, hold_time_max, cust_bm, cust_short_name, cust_mat_no, cust_back_no, cust_mat_name, cust_mat_name_en, cust_color_code, cust_color, cust_snp, cust_cal_unit, cust_buy_unit, cust_spec_model, cust_mat_catg, cust_left_right_flag, cust_imp_protect_flag, cust_car_model, cust_car_per_qty, cust_place_pos, cust_post_proc, cust_pack_bm, cust_pack_rate, cust_pack_group, cust_label_color, cust_label_tmpl, cust_mat_label_tmpl, cust_mod_tmpl, cust_use_flag, cust_backup1, cust_backup2, cust_backup3, prepare_lead_time, send_lead_time, maker_cal, maker_line_bm, mat_order, create_by, create_time) values(#{makerBm}, #{makerShortName},#{makerMatNo},#{makerBackNo},#{makerMatName},#{makerMatNameEn}, #{makerColorCode},#{makerColor},#{makerSnp},#{makerCalUnit},#{makerBuyUnit},#{makerSpecModel}, #{makerMatCatg},#{makerLeftRightFlag},#{makerImpProtectFlag},#{makerCarModel},#{makerCarPerQty}, #{makerPlacePos},#{makerPostProc},#{makerPackBm},#{makerPackRate},#{makerPackGroup},#{makerTrayStdBoxQty}, #{makerInitStockType},#{makerLabelColor},#{makerLabelTmpl},#{makerMatLabelTmpl},#{makerModTmpl}, #{makerUseFlag},#{makerLine},#{makerBackup1},#{makerBackup2},#{makerBackup3},#{stockDown},#{stockUp}, #{holdTimeMin},#{holdTimeMax},#{custBm},#{custShortName},#{custMatNo},#{custBackNo},#{custMatName}, #{custMatNameEn},#{custColorCode},#{custColor},#{custSnp},#{custCalUnit},#{custBuyUnit},#{custSpecModel}, #{custMatCatg},#{custLeftRightFlag},#{custImpProtectFlag},#{custCarModel},#{custCarPerQty},#{custPlacePos}, #{custPostProc},#{custPackBm},#{custPackRate},#{custPackGroup}, #{custLabelColor},#{custLabelTmpl}, #{custMatLabelTmpl},#{custModTmpl},#{custUseFlag}, #{custBackup1},#{custBackup2},#{custBackup3},#{prepareLeadTime}, #{sendLeadTime},#{makerCal},#{makerLineBm},#{matOrder},#{createBy},NOW())

insert into mo_material(maker_bm, maker_short_name, maker_mat_no, maker_back_no, maker_mat_name, maker_mat_name_en, maker_color_code, maker_color, maker_snp, maker_cal_unit, maker_buy_unit, maker_spec_model, maker_mat_catg, maker_left_right_flag, maker_imp_protect_flag, maker_car_model, maker_car_per_qty, maker_place_pos, maker_post_proc, maker_pack_bm, maker_pack_rate, maker_pack_group, maker_tray_std_box_qty, maker_init_stock_type, maker_label_color, maker_label_tmpl, maker_mat_label_tmpl, maker_mod_tmpl, maker_use_flag, maker_line, maker_backup1, maker_backup2, maker_backup3, stock_down, stock_up, hold_time_min, hold_time_max, cust_bm, cust_short_name, cust_mat_no, cust_back_no, cust_mat_name, cust_mat_name_en, cust_color_code, cust_color, cust_snp, cust_cal_unit, cust_buy_unit, cust_spec_model, cust_mat_catg, cust_left_right_flag, cust_imp_protect_flag, cust_car_model, cust_car_per_qty, cust_place_pos, cust_post_proc, cust_pack_bm, cust_pack_rate, cust_pack_group, cust_label_color, cust_label_tmpl, cust_mat_label_tmpl, cust_mod_tmpl, cust_use_flag, cust_backup1, cust_backup2, cust_backup3, prepare_lead_time, send_lead_time, maker_cal, maker_line_bm, mat_order, create_by, create_time,update_by,update_time) values
(#{t.makerBm}, #{t.makerShortName},#{t.makerMatNo},#{t.makerBackNo},#{t.makerMatName},#{t.makerMatNameEn}, #{t.makerColorCode},#{t.makerColor},#{t.makerSnp},#{t.makerCalUnit},#{t.makerBuyUnit},#{t.makerSpecModel}, #{t.makerMatCatg},#{t.makerLeftRightFlag},#{t.makerImpProtectFlag},#{t.makerCarModel},#{t.makerCarPerQty}, #{t.makerPlacePos},#{t.makerPostProc},#{t.makerPackBm},#{t.makerPackRate},#{t.makerPackGroup},#{t.makerTrayStdBoxQty}, #{t.makerInitStockType},#{t.makerLabelColor},#{t.makerLabelTmpl},#{t.makerMatLabelTmpl},#{t.makerModTmpl}, #{t.makerUseFlag},#{t.makerLine},#{t.makerBackup1},#{t.makerBackup2},#{t.makerBackup3},#{t.stockDown},#{t.stockUp}, #{t.holdTimeMin},#{t.holdTimeMax},#{t.custBm},#{t.custShortName},#{t.custMatNo},#{t.custBackNo},#{t.custMatName}, #{t.custMatNameEn},#{t.custColorCode},#{t.custColor},#{t.custSnp},#{t.custCalUnit},#{t.custBuyUnit},#{t.custSpecModel}, #{t.custMatCatg},#{t.custLeftRightFlag},#{t.custImpProtectFlag},#{t.custCarModel},#{t.custCarPerQty},#{t.custPlacePos}, #{t.custPostProc},#{t.custPackBm},#{t.custPackRate},#{t.custPackGroup}, #{t.custLabelColor},#{t.custLabelTmpl}, #{t.custMatLabelTmpl},#{t.custModTmpl},#{t.custUseFlag}, #{t.custBackup1},#{t.custBackup2},#{t.custBackup3},#{t.prepareLeadTime}, #{t.sendLeadTime},#{t.makerCal},#{t.makerLineBm},#{t.matOrder},#{t.createBy},#{t.createTime}, #{t.updateBy}, #{t.updateTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE maker_bm = VALUES(maker_bm), maker_short_name = VALUES(maker_short_name), maker_back_no = VALUES(maker_back_no), maker_mat_name = VALUES(maker_mat_name), maker_mat_name_en = VALUES(maker_mat_name_en), maker_color_code = VALUES(maker_color_code), maker_color = VALUES(maker_color), maker_snp = VALUES(maker_snp), maker_cal_unit = VALUES(maker_cal_unit), maker_buy_unit = VALUES(maker_buy_unit), maker_spec_model = VALUES(maker_spec_model), maker_mat_catg = VALUES(maker_mat_catg), maker_left_right_flag = VALUES(maker_left_right_flag), maker_imp_protect_flag = VALUES(maker_imp_protect_flag), maker_car_model = VALUES(maker_car_model), maker_car_per_qty = VALUES(maker_car_per_qty), maker_place_pos = VALUES(maker_place_pos), maker_post_proc = VALUES(maker_post_proc), maker_pack_bm = VALUES(maker_pack_bm), maker_pack_rate = VALUES(maker_pack_rate), maker_pack_group = VALUES(maker_pack_group), maker_tray_std_box_qty = VALUES(maker_tray_std_box_qty), maker_init_stock_type = VALUES(maker_init_stock_type), maker_label_color = VALUES(maker_label_color), maker_label_tmpl = VALUES(maker_label_tmpl), maker_mat_label_tmpl = VALUES(maker_mat_label_tmpl), maker_mod_tmpl = VALUES(maker_mod_tmpl), maker_use_flag = VALUES(maker_use_flag), maker_line = VALUES(maker_line), maker_backup1 = VALUES(maker_backup1), maker_backup2 = VALUES(maker_backup2), maker_backup3 = VALUES(maker_backup3), stock_down = VALUES(stock_down), stock_up = VALUES(stock_up), hold_time_min = VALUES(hold_time_min), hold_time_max = VALUES(hold_time_max), cust_bm = VALUES(cust_bm), cust_short_name = VALUES(cust_short_name), cust_back_no = VALUES(cust_back_no), cust_mat_name = VALUES(cust_mat_name), cust_mat_name_en = VALUES(cust_mat_name_en), cust_color = VALUES(cust_color), cust_snp = VALUES(cust_snp), cust_cal_unit = VALUES(cust_cal_unit), cust_buy_unit = VALUES(cust_buy_unit), cust_spec_model = VALUES(cust_spec_model), cust_mat_catg = VALUES(cust_mat_catg), cust_left_right_flag = VALUES(cust_left_right_flag), cust_imp_protect_flag = VALUES(cust_imp_protect_flag), cust_car_model = VALUES(cust_car_model), cust_car_per_qty = VALUES(cust_car_per_qty), cust_place_pos = VALUES(cust_place_pos), cust_post_proc = VALUES(cust_post_proc), cust_pack_bm = VALUES(cust_pack_bm), cust_pack_rate = VALUES(cust_pack_rate), cust_pack_group = VALUES(cust_pack_group), cust_label_color = VALUES(cust_label_color), cust_label_tmpl = VALUES(cust_label_tmpl), cust_mat_label_tmpl = VALUES(cust_mat_label_tmpl), cust_mod_tmpl = VALUES(cust_mod_tmpl), cust_use_flag = VALUES(cust_use_flag), cust_backup1 = VALUES(cust_backup1), cust_backup2 = VALUES(cust_backup2), cust_backup3 = VALUES(cust_backup3), prepare_lead_time = VALUES(prepare_lead_time), send_lead_time = VALUES(send_lead_time), maker_cal = VALUES(maker_cal), maker_line_bm = VALUES(maker_line_bm), mat_order = VALUES(mat_order), create_by = VALUES(create_by), create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.delete: delete from mo_material where maker_mat_no = #{makerMatNo} and cust_mat_no = #{custMatNo} and cust_color_code = #{custColorCode}
